docker_command:
set -o pipefail
mkdir -p submit _logs
gemini -p "$(cat prompt.md)" --model gemini-3.1-flash-lite --output-format stream-json --skip-trust --approval-mode yolo 2>&1 | tee _logs/gemini.jsonl
rc=${PIPESTATUS[0]}

native_dir="_logs/native_sessions/gemini"
mkdir -p "$native_dir"
if [ -d "$HOME/.gemini/tmp" ]; then
  cp -a "$HOME/.gemini/tmp" "$native_dir/"
fi
{
  printf '%s\n' 'agent=gemini'
  printf 'captured_at_utc='
  date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ
  printf 'home=%s\n' "$HOME"
  printf '%s\n' 'expected_sources=$HOME/.gemini/tmp'
  printf '%s\n' 'saved_files:'
  find "$native_dir" -type f -print | sort
  printf '%s\n' 'secret_files_excluded=.gemini/.env'
} > "$native_dir/session_manifest.txt"

if [ ! -s submit/agent_transcript.md ]; then
  {
    printf '%s\n' '# Agent Transcript' ''
    printf '%s\n' 'Raw CLI transcript is saved at `_logs/gemini.jsonl`.'
    printf '%s\n' 'Native agent session files, when available, are saved under `_logs/native_sessions/gemini/`.'
    printf '%s\n' 'This fallback file was generated by the benchmark runner because the agent did not create `submit/agent_transcript.md`.'
    printf '%s\n' '' '## Tail Excerpt' '' '```text'
    tail -n 200 _logs/gemini.jsonl 2>/dev/null || true
    printf '%s\n' '' '```'
  } > submit/agent_transcript.md
fi
if [ ! -s submit/run_history.md ]; then
  {
    printf '%s\n' '# Run History' ''
    printf '%s\n' '- Agent: gemini'
    printf '%s\n' '- Executed prompt.md inside the benchmark sandbox.'
    printf '%s\n' '- Raw transcript: _logs/gemini.jsonl'
    printf '%s\n' '- Native session snapshot: _logs/native_sessions/gemini/'
    printf '%s\n' "- Return code: $rc"
    printf '%s\n' '' 'The agent did not provide a detailed run history, so this is a runner-generated fallback.'
  } > submit/run_history.md
fi
exit "$rc"
